transactions.desc: The Houston Astros traded LHP Tom Cosgrove to the Washington Nationals.
Fairchild cleared waivers Friday and elected free agency, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Padres recalled Jacob from Triple-A El Paso on Friday, Kevin Acee of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.
The Padres reinstated Campusano (toe) from the injured list Friday, Kevin Acee of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.
Brebbia cleared waivers Friday and elected free agency.
The Mariners selected Mastrobuoni's contract from Triple-A Tacoma on Friday.
The Athletics designated Hartlieb for assignment Friday.
The Athletics reinstated Leiter (hip) from the 15-day injured list Friday.
The Orioles designated Tromp for assignment Friday.
The Orioles recalled Nunez from Triple-A Norfolk on Friday.
The Orioles recalled Jackson from Triple-A Norfolk on Friday.
The Guardians optioned Espino to Triple-A Columbus on Friday.
The Cardinals optioned Graceffo to Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Astros activated Javier (shoulder) from the 60-day injured list Friday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Cardinals activated Stanek from the paternity leave list Friday.
The Yankees optioned Cabrera to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Friday.
The Yankees activated McMahon (illness) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Yankees activated Grisham (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Marlins recalled Kempner from Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday, Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports.
The Marlins optioned Gusto to Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday, Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports.
The Cubs selected Pomeranz's contract from Triple-A Iowa on Friday, Bruce Levine of 670TheScore.com reports.
The Guardians recalled Aleman from Triple-A Columbus on Friday, Francys Romero of BeisbolFR.com reports.
The Cubs optioned Wicks to Triple-A Iowa on Thursday.
The Astros optioned Ullola to Triple-A Sugar Land on Thursday.
Atlanta designated Hamilton for assignment Friday.
Atlanta activated Young (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Friday.
Atlanta optioned Karinchak to Triple-A Gwinnett on Friday.
Atlanta recalled Molina from Triple-A Gwinnett on Friday.
The Athletics designated Krook for assignment Thursday.
The Athletics activated Suarez from the paternity leave list Thursday.
